description: CompositionNavy blue shirt made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, half buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid button tabs and buttoned cuffs and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleachDo not wringUse warm ironCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish shirt from femella. The blended fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans and sandals for that perfect girly look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
